extraction.one_line_summary: KUSS Sepp won from breakaway on Alto de Observatorio Astrofísico after MARTINEZ Lenny's Groupama-FDJ teammates controlled break positioning him for GC jersey.
tactical_patterns: Groupama-FDJ embedded MARTINEZ Lenny with two strong teammates in break to control positioning before steep final climb
SOLER Marc took intermediate sprint bonuses while virtual leader, revealing hunger for GC time gains from breakaway position
Jumbo-Visma controlled break tempo through TRATNIK Jan before steep pitches, avoiding individual leader responsibilities while gaining GC time
EVENEPOEL Remco limited losses to 30s after going into red, suggesting pacing discipline more important than defending jersey

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: won stage at 2000m+ altitude where he historically excels, confirming high-altitude specialist status
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: positive: at 20 years old took GC lead via team-supported breakaway, but pressure-handling on French team unknown
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: lost red jersey but recovered from 40s to 30s deficit, showing restraint after overextension
rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: abandoned after high-speed crash at 40km, removing key UAE climbing support
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: negative: dropped 2 miles from finish on steep gradients, suggesting poor form for sustained steep climbs
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: aggressively pursued bonus seconds while virtual leader, showing GC ambition from breakaway tactics
